admin-crm.title: CRM Reporting
admin-crm.description: Tenant-wide CRM reporting for pipeline health, source quality, and forecast snapshots.

snapshot.title: Latest forecast snapshot
snapshot.description: Previous UTC snapshot date, grouped by currency.
snapshot.empty: No forecast snapshot has been generated for the previous UTC date.
snapshot.staleEmpty: The latest snapshot is stale. Current values are hidden until the scheduler refreshes them.

branchPipeline.title: Branch pipeline summary
branchPipeline.description: Live 90-day weighted pipeline by branch, pipeline, and currency.
branchPipeline.empty: No live pipeline rows are available for the default reporting window.

sourceBreakdown.title: Source breakdown
sourceBreakdown.description: Top CRM sources by deal count for the default reporting window.
sourceBreakdown.empty: No source rows are available for the default reporting window.

charts.hiddenItems: {count, plural, one {# additional row hidden from the chart summary} other {# additional rows hidden from the chart summary}}

pipelineAmount.title: Pipeline amount chart
pipelineAmount.description: Supplemental comparison of total and weighted pipeline amount. The table above is the source of truth.

admin-crm.excludedRows: {count, plural, one {# aggregate row excluded} other {# aggregate rows excluded}}
admin-crm.excludedRowsHelp: Rows can be excluded from aggregate metrics when required reporting fields are missing or inconsistent.

error.tenant: CRM reporting is unavailable for this tenant context.
error.role: This admin account cannot view CRM reporting.
error.branch: CRM reporting requires a valid branch scope.
error.agent: Agent-scoped CRM reporting is not shown on the admin dashboard.
error.window: The CRM reporting window is invalid.
error.grouping: This CRM reporting grouping is not supported.
error.generic: CRM reporting could not be loaded. Try again later.
